description: Fix SQL query missing active-record filter
goal: Fix SearchItems to exclude expired records (ActiveUntil < today)
expected_behavior: SearchItems should add a WHERE clause to exclude items where ActiveUntil is not null and ActiveUntil < today's $HOROLOG date.
hints: Add to the WHERE clause: AND (ActiveUntil IS NULL OR ActiveUntil >= ?)
Pass +$HOROLOG as the second parameter to %Execute for today's date
IMPORTANT: The SQL table name for Catalog.Item is 'Catalog.Item' (not Catalog_Item)
In IRIS SQL: for a class Pkg.SubPkg.ClassName the table is Pkg_SubPkg.ClassName, but for Catalog.Item it is just Catalog.Item
NULL in IRIS SQL means the property was never set — use IS NULL to check

metadata.source: Replaced external-dep version; same active-record SQL filter pattern
metadata.author: objectscript-coder
